untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires tracking trend line slope changes over time (from ~30% to ~60%+). The allowed indicators do not include a 'trend line slope' or angle measurement capability. body_pct was used as a proxy for slope steepness, but this is approximate and not the precise slope measurement described in the original signal. A custom trend line detection function would be required for accurate translation.
translation_notes: Entry conditions approximate the bump phase slope acceleration using body_pct as a proxy indicator (30% to 60%+ rise). Price closes below pivot point (used as trend line substitute). Exit condition uses reversal back above trend line proxy. Stop loss and hold days are reasonable defaults given AUTHOR_SILENT specifications.
